svg.title: Live order tracking flow from placement to real-time delivery update
svg.desc: Seven-step flowchart showing how an order moves from customer placement through restaurant acceptance, PostGIS rider dispatch, WebSocket broadcast, to live customer update. Includes fallback dispatch tier on the right.
svg.text: from order placement to real-time delivery update
Cart checked out · payment captured · order created in DB
Order confirmed · status updated · preparation starts
PostGIS ST_DWithin finds nearby available riders
Rider accepts · assignment saved · delivery starts
Rider sends location every 3–5s · stored in PostgreSQL
Server pushes location to customer · no polling
